cards.name: King of Cups
cards.interpretation: wise, diplomatic, balance between head and heart, devoted, advisor, counsellor

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation

cards.name: 4 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: generosity, giving, spending, openness, financial insecurity, reckless spending
